title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/03/2025
Today, DCE Iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening, fluctuating upward throughout the day. The most-traded contractI2505 finally closed at 776, with a daily increase of 0.65%. Traders' willingness to sell was moderate; steel mills' inquiries decreased compared to yesterday; at the same time, traders' speculative enthusiasm weakened; the market transaction atmosphere was moderate.
